## 9. Next Steps

Sprint 1 is **complete** from a story-delivery perspective. Recommended actions:

1. Run `sprint-complete` workflow to record velocity, delivered_points, and commitment_reliability for Sprint 1
2. Run `sprint-retrospective` to finalize Sprint 1 and capture lessons learned
3. Run `sprint-planning` to define Sprint 2 (EPIC-2 stories: SDL3 windowing & input)
4. Verify `sprint-status.yaml` is updated: sprint-1 `status:` should move from `active` → `completing` → `complete`

---

## 10. Workflow Quick Reference

| Gap Type | Suggested Workflow |
|----------|--------------------|
| BLOCKER | `dev-story` (resume to address blocker) |
| USER_ACTION | Manual intervention |
| AC_FAIL | `ac-validation` |
| ATDD_GAP | `dev-story` (resume to complete unchecked items) |
| IN_PROGRESS | `dev-story --from DEV_STORY` |
| STALLED | `./paw {story-key}` |
| STRUCT_MISS | Depends on missing artifact |
| FEEDBACK | `./paw {story-key}` |
| PHANTOM | `./paw {story-key} --from DEV_STORY` |
| PLACEHOLDER | `./paw {story-key} --from DEV_STORY` |
| REACH_ORPHAN | `bootstrap-reachability` |
| BOOT_FAIL | `dev-story` (fix startup failures) |
| TEST_ANTIPATTERN | `enforce-e2e-test-quality` mode=fix |
| CONTRACT_BREAK | `schema-alignment` |
| PEN_DRIFT | `design-screen` + `validate-pen-compliance` |

*Full taxonomy: `_bmad/pcc/partials/gap-taxonomy.md`*
